satire_attempt: Today on Compounding Spiritual Returns: even ONE chaos drill counts. Even half a code review counts. Even a quarter of an alert configuration counts. Every. Little. Thing. Counts. Including this newsletter, which counts toward your engineering enlightenment. Subscribe for $50 a month, partial subscriptions count too.
verdict_reason: The satire mocks 'every little thing helps,' which is precisely the misreading the engineering layer guards against. The falsifiability explicitly rejects this: 'Krishna's claim is narrow: the property holds for action structured AS karma-yoga (without attachment to specific fruits), not for all effort. The chaos drill done as a checkbox for a manager's expectations is not karma-yoga; it is a fruit-attached action and its partial application will not have the same property.' The counter-example explicitly carves out structurally-fruit-bearing engineering actions (interrupted schema migration with corruption failure mode). The voice does not become motivational; it remains restrained and structural.
